spec_sources: fastapi/security/  (well-defined public API with type hints)

audit_scope.rationale: Scoped to modules where known bugs (0.115.9-0.115.14) exist. Full repo audit (>200 modules) exceeds benchmark cost cap (50 files per module).

known_bugs.description: HTTPDigest.__call__ raises exception even when auto_error=False
Model description field truncated when description contains form feed (U+000C) character
Unions not properly supported when using Form parameters
convert_underscores=False not respected for header Pydantic models
Annotated custom validators (AfterValidator) not properly supported in query params
Pydantic 2.11 compatibility - internal annotation usage pattern incompatible
